onboarding.languageSubtitle: You can change this later in your profile.
onboarding.welcomeText: Komma is a little break from scrolling — and a nudge to actually do something. Three quick questions and you're in.
onboarding.howItWorksDetail: Start a challenge · post your proof · collect Aura
onboarding.interestsSubtitle: Pick up to four. We'll suggest matching challenges.
onboarding.contextTitle: Who do you want to start with?
onboarding.contextSubtitle: You can start or join more crews any time later.

agb.title: Terms and Conditions
agb.updated: As of June 2026 · applies to the "Komma" app
agb.authoritative: The authoritative version of these terms is German. This translation is provided for information only.

sections.title: 1. Scope and provider
body: These Terms and Conditions ("T&C") govern the use of the "Komma" app operated by Gotham Consulting GmbH, Rosenweg 4, 99820 Hörselberg-Hainich, Germany ("Provider"). By registering you agree to these T&C.

sections.title: 2. Service description
body: Komma is a social participation platform where users create and join challenges, upload proofs and form crews. Some content is generated by AI and labeled accordingly.

sections.title: 3. Registration and minimum age
body: A free account is required. Use is permitted from age 14. Minors require consent from a parent or guardian.

sections.title: 4. User content and license
body: You remain the author of your content and grant the Provider a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to store and display it within the app. You warrant not to infringe third-party rights.

sections.title: 5. Code of conduct
body: It is forbidden to upload or share content that
list: glorifies violence, is discriminatory, pornographic or harmful to minors,
harasses, threatens or incites criminal acts,
contains malware or compromises the app's security.

sections.title: 6. Direct messages and encryption
body: Direct messages are stored encrypted at rest on the server. There is no end-to-end encryption; the Provider may decrypt messages in justified individual cases to comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 7. AI-generated content
body: Challenges, suggestions, translations, cover images and badges may be partially or fully AI-generated. They may contain errors and do not replace professional or legal advice.

sections.title: 8. Availability
body: The Provider aims for high availability but does not guarantee it. Maintenance, third-party outages or force majeure may cause temporary limitations.

sections.title: 9. Liability
body: The Provider is liable without limitation for intent and gross negligence and under the German Product Liability Act. For slight negligence only for breach of material contractual duties and limited to typically foreseeable damages.

sections.title: 10. Termination
body: You can delete your account at any time in profile settings. The Provider may terminate for cause in case of serious violations.

sections.title: 11. Changes to the T&C
body: Changes are displayed in the app. If you do not object within four weeks, they are deemed accepted.

sections.title: 12. Final provisions
body: German law applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. If a provision is invalid, the others remain in force. Place of jurisdiction is, where permitted, the seat of the Provider.

agb.contact: For questions about these T&C please use the contact details in the {{imprint}}.

sections.title: EU dispute resolution
body: The EU Commission provides an online dispute resolution platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are not obliged to participate in dispute resolution procedures.

sections.title: Liability for content
body: As a service provider we are responsible for our own content under § 7 (1) DDG. Under §§ 8–10 DDG we are not obliged to monitor third-party information.

sections.title: Liability for links
body: Our offer contains links to external websites whose content we do not influence. The respective provider is always responsible.

sections.title: Copyright
body: Content created by the site operators is subject to German copyright law. User-generated content remains with the respective authors.
